nasb.text: He lurks in a hiding place as a lion in his lair; He lurks to catch the afflicted; He catches the afflicted when he draws him into his net.

esv.text: he lurks in ambush like a lion in his thicket; he lurks that he may seize the poor; he seizes the poor when he draws him into his net.

cnv.text: 他在隱密處埋伏，像獅子埋伏在叢林中； 他埋伏要擄走困苦人， 他把困苦人拉入自己的網中，擄走了他們。

ccb.text: 他们像狮子埋伏在暗处， 猎取无助的人， 用网罗拖走他们。

csbs.text: 他埋伏在隐秘处， 如同洞穴中的狮子。 他埋伏，为要掳走困苦人； 他把困苦人拉入自己的网罗，掳走他们。
